author: PC Gamer
text:
Lies of P studio is hiring an 'AI Creator' for future projects but says the role will not be 'directly involved' in the development of the sequel
The successful applicant will use AI tools like Midjourney and Stable Diffusion for "asset creation," post-processing, and training AI models for use in game library creation.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Sega has canceled its live service 'Super Game' due to 'intensifying market competition,' and I really, really hope it's a sign that the industry is finally correcting itself
Years of catastrophic bets on F2P mega hits may finally be subsiding.

author: PC Gamer
text:
After his shock retirement last year, legendary former Tekken boss has landed at one of Japan's biggest fighting game publishers
Katsuhiro Harada is now the CEO of VS Studio.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Valve snuck a Wilhelm scream Easter egg into the new Steam Controller
My Steam Controller just screamed at me, Wilhelmingly.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Elon Musk, Sam Altman and the world's billionaires are terrified of the Google AI genius behind a 25-year-old computer game, because they think he might actually end up controlling god
"There is a very low probability of a good future if someone doesn't slow Demis down."

author: PC Gamer
text:
Gang of Dragon studio website disappears without notice as NetEase funding dries up
Nagoshi Studio, founded in 2022 by Yakuza creator Toshihiro Nagoshi, just revealed its debut project at the 2025 Game Awards.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Path of Exile's overwhelming complexity isn't the real reason new players pass on it, director believes: 'I think that PoE 1's being such an old game is in itself the accessibility problem'
PoE 2 is certainly complicated, but it's much kinder to new players.

author: PC Gamer
text:
One of the best rated games on Steam this week is an action platformer where you can parry a giant industrial digger with a chainsaw
It is, admittedly, a pretty good pitch.

author: PC Gamer
text:
20 years later, the world deserves another Sid Meier's Railroads!
Just three years after Railroads! came out, we were already reappraising it.

author: PC Gamer
text:
Valve made more than 27 million unique images for Counter-Strike listings as part of its new 'major update' to Steam's Community Market
The big marketplace update is live now in beta.
